chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 114 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 1535/25. (Ex) 2. For hearing of main case. 27.11.2025 Syed Asif Ali, advocate for applicant. On 13.11.2025, following order was passed:- “13.11.2025 Syed Asif Ali, advocate for applicant. Learned counsel is not prepared. At his request, to come up on 20.11.2025.” On 20.11.2025, following order was passed:- “20.11.2025 Syed Asif Ali, advocate for applicant. Learned counsel once again remains unable to assist, especially in view of the judgment dated 16.04.2025 passed by a division bench of this court in SSTRA No. 160/2024 (M/s. New Era Fabric v. Commissioner Inland Revenue). Learned counsel seeks time to obtain instructions. At his request, to come up on 27.11.2025.” In pursuance thereof, learned counsel does not press this reference, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
